title: GrantAI - Agentic AI Grant & Funding Finder for Startups

problemStatement.title: AI Grant and Funding Finder for Startups

description: GrantAI is an AI-powered platform that helps startups discover government grants, evaluate eligibility, generate proposal drafts, analyze deadlines, and receive funding guidance using IBM Granite, IBM watsonx.ai, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), and a Multi-Agent workflow.
